SEARCH
Package com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song

Class PartMeasure

java.lang.Object
com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song.PartMeasure
public class PartMeasure extends Object

A class that models a measure of a part.

  • Field Details

    • NOTE_LENGTH_REGEX_PATTERN

      public static final Pattern NOTE_LENGTH_REGEX_PATTERN

  • Constructor Details

    • PartMeasure

      public PartMeasure(com.google.gson.JsonElement partMeasureJson, PartMeasureParameters params) throws SymfonionException, CompatJsonException

      The partMeasureJson needs to be a JSON element which can promote to the following object with CompatJsonUtils#asJsonArrayWithPromotion( JsonElement, Object…​).

      partMeasureJson
      {
  "notes": "<strokeSequence:array>",
  "length": "<length:string@{Fraction}>",
  "gate": "<gate:number@{double}>",
  "volume": "<volume:array@{int}>",
  "pan": "<pan:array@{int}>",
  "reverb": "<reverb:array@{int}>",
  "chorus": "<chorus:array@{int}>",
  "modulation": "<modulation:array@{int}>",
  "aftertouch": "<aftertouch:array@{int}>",
  "sysex": "<sysex:array@{int}>"
}

      If it doesn’t have a corresponding element, it will be considered null is specified. The NOTES String should match the following regular expression or such strings concatenated by ;.

      ([A-Zac-z])()([><])([\\+\\-]*)?

      That is, the data this class host is actually a sequence of strokes, not merely a stroke. Historical reason introduced this naming inconsistency.

      See also Pattern.Parameters and CompatJsonUtils#asJsonArrayWithDefault(JsonElement, JsonArray, Object&#8230;&#8203;).

      Parameters:
      partMeasureJson - A JSON object to be interpreted as a stroke.
      params - Default values of strokes when omitted.
      Throws:
      SymfonionException - Failed to process partMeasureJson.
      CompatJsonException - Failed to interpret partMeasureJson.

    • PartMeasure

      public PartMeasure(com.google.gson.JsonObject obj, PartMeasureParameters defaultValues) throws SymfonionException, CompatJsonException
      Throws:
      SymfonionException
      CompatJsonException

  • Method Details

    • compile

      public void compile(MidiCompiler compiler, MidiCompilerContext context) throws InvalidMidiDataException

      Compiles this object using a given compiler and store its result in the context.

      Parameters:
      compiler - A compiler with which this object is processed.
      context - A context in which the compiled result is stored.
      Throws:
      InvalidMidiDataException - Failed to generate MIDI data.

    • length

      public Fraction length()

      Returns the length of this object.

      Returns:
      The length of a stroke.

    • gate

      public double gate()

      Returns the gate of a stroke in this object. It shows the ratio to keep pressing a key to the entire length of a stroke.

      Returns:
      The gate of a stroke.

    • defaultValues

      public PartMeasureParameters defaultValues()

      Returns a PartMeasureParameters object that defines default values of this PartMeasure object.

      Returns:
      A PartMeasureParameters object.
      See Also:
      • PartMeasureParameters

    • parseNoteLength

      public static Fraction parseNoteLength(String length)
